mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (uid, type, content, from_uid, from_uname, pid, ptitle, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{uid}, #{type}, #{content}, #{fromUid}, #{fromUname}, #{pid}, #{ptitle}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE uid = #{uid}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE uid = #{uid} AND type = #{type}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE uid = #{uid} AND is_read = 0
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM notification WHERE uid = #{uid} AND is_read = 0 GROUP BY type
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE nid = #{nid}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE uid = #{uid} AND is_read = 0
